name: Fireworks Show

abilities.name: Pick a Card
abilities.text:
After resolving an attack against this model, it may drain a (t) to flip a card which may not be cheated and apply the following:
(c) or (m): This model gains a Glowy token and draws a card.
(r) or (t): The attacker gains an Entranced token. This model makes a Pyrotechnic marker within 3" of the attacker.

abilities.name: Fast Cast
abilities.text: This model's Charge action may generate (magic) actions instead of (melee) actions.

actions.name: Inspect The Stage
actions.effects: Make a Pyrotechnic marker within range.

extraction_notes: Glowy and Entranced tokens are referenced but not defined on this card
Pyrotechnic marker is created but its full rules are not provided on this card
